location.title: Main Intersection
location.description: Four unlit corridors meet beneath a cracked navigation panel. Loose wiring hangs motionless in the vacuum.

narration: Your boots lock and release across the threshold. Ten points vanish from the air gauge before you reach the main intersection.

actions.title: Read the Junction Map
actions.description: Spend suit air tracing the surviving labels on the navigation panel.

actions.title: Trace the Captain's Route
actions.description: Follow physical deck markings toward the captain's section while suit air falls.

actions.title: Inspect the Hull Damage
actions.description: Use suit air checking the junction for the cause and direction of the breach.
